name: Digital Restaurants Profile: The future of food discovery
rich_text_block:
With over $863 billion in sales in the US last year, the restaurant industry has established a sturdy foothold in today’s consumer-driven economy. But being successful in the restaurant business is not an easy task. The success of a restaurant boils down to how customers perceive, experience, and advocate for the brand.

Is your brand getting found and chosen by using their digital profiles?

In this report, you will find:

  1. Why you should build your brand's digital identity across multiple channels.
  2. Search trends of consumers - how your restaurants are being discovered.
  3. The reliability of brand information on newer media - what business content are your consumers looking for and how you can get it to them.

seo.title: Digital Restaurants Profile: The future of food discovery
